behavior_summary: This script implements a Necromancer NPC with a simple inspect/label (U8P_NEC1::look) and a multi-stage 'U8P_NEC1::use' interaction that teaches spells and advances the player's test.
U8P_NEC1::look responds to player examine/U8P_NEC1::look by barks the single label "Necromancer" and then suspends.

U8P_NEC1::use branches on Item::getQuality (quality values 0x01..0x04) to select one of four staged interactions. Each stage runs dialog teaching a spell, sets a corresponding global metNecN flag to prevent repetition, and may run camera/stasis/fade/teleport sequences to present the lesson.

U8P_NEC1::func2311 prepares the scene (avatar stasis, camera reposition/spawned directional effect) before dialog/transition sequences; U8P_NEC1::func23DB finalizes the scene (spawns a concluding effect based on distance and clears avatar stasis).
Several spawned free functions and fade/teleport operations are used to orchestrate short cinematic sequences; exact effect details are via spawned FREE::* functions and are inferred.
notable_control_flow: Entry: U8P_NEC1::look is a process-type handler for U8P_NEC1::look/examine and is terminal after a single bark.
U8P_NEC1::use begins by reading a gate flag (deathSpeakCast) and then calls Item::getQuality to branch into four quality-based paths (0x01..0x04).
Each quality branch checks a per-stage global flag (metNec1..metNec4); if unset the script runs the teaching dialog and sets the corresponding metNecN flag.

Some branches call U8P_NEC1::func2311 before dialog and U8P_NEC1::func23DB after dialog to orchestrate stasis/camera/effect/teleport sequences; these helpers choose different spawned effect codes based on FREE::getDistanceBetween.

Sequences frequently spawn processes (spawn), store returned pids/temps, suspend to wait for them, manipulate Item::setFrame in a short loop (local1), and U8P_NEC1::use FadeToBlack / Npc::teleport / FadeFromBlack for higher-stage transitions.
open_questions: Exact visual/audio behavior of spawned functions (->FREE::func1C19, ->FREE::func1C8B, addressof(...)->METHOD::func091C) — their concrete effects are inferred (likely sound/visual/timed sequences) but not certain.
Precise teleport targets and ownership semantics in the Npc::teleport calls used for higher-stage transitions (map/instance/x/y arguments are present but their gameplay intent is inferred).
Scope and persistence of local1: it appears to be a short-lived frame/counter for Item::setFrame animation, but exact lifetime and reuse across calls is low-confidence.

main_function.name: U8P_NEC1::look
main_function.purpose: Respond to player examine / 'U8P_NEC1::look' on the Necromancer by displaying the short label and ending the U8P_NEC1::look process.
entry_conditions: Triggered by the engine when the player examines/looks at this NPC (process type 0x0208).

function_map.name: U8P_NEC1::look
function_map.role: inspect/description handler that barks 'Necromancer' and suspends

function_map.name: U8P_NEC1::use
function_map.role: primary interaction process: branches by Item::getQuality to teach staged Necromancer spells, sets metNecN flags, and controls cinematic/effect transitions

function_map.name: U8P_NEC1::func2311
function_map.role: scene preparatory helper: ensures avatar stasis, spawns directional/effect and cameraFollowAvatar variants, centers camera

function_map.name: U8P_NEC1::func23DB
function_map.role: scene finalizer helper: spawns concluding effect variant based on distance and clears avatar stasis

internal_calls.purpose: Prepare avatar/camera/stasis and spawn short directional/camera effects before teaching/transition sequences
Run a concluding effect (distance-dependent) and unset avatar stasis after certain branches (finalize transition)

external_calls.purpose: Select which stage (0x01..0x04) of dialog/teaching to run
Freeze/unfreeze the avatar during cinematic/effect sequences
Decide which camera/effect timing variant to spawn based on player distance
Spawn a directional/method effect using Item::getDirToItem (likely an oriented effect/sound)
Move/position the camera at computed coordinates before suspending
Spawn a concluding effect variant (code 0x19 or 0x14) based on distance and wait for it
Fade out/in around teleport transitions for higher-stage branches
Teleport the NPC or related entity as part of advancing stage transitions
Query NPC coordinates for camera/teleport and animate Item frames during short loops

reads.name: deathSpeakCast
reads.likely_effect: A gate/guard read at U8P_NEC1::use start that determines whether the initial stasis/camera prep sequence should run

writes.name: metNec1
writes.likely_effect: Set when the quality==0x01 lesson is completed to prevent repeating the first-stage teaching

writes.name: metNec2
writes.likely_effect: Set when the quality==0x02 lesson is completed to prevent repeating the second-stage teaching

writes.name: metNec3
writes.likely_effect: Set when the quality==0x03 lesson is completed to prevent repeating the third-stage teaching

writes.name: metNec4
writes.likely_effect: Set when the quality==0x04 lesson is completed to prevent repeating the fourth-stage teaching

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements a Necromancer NPC with a simple inspect/label (U8P_NEC1::look) and a multi-stage 'U8P_NEC1::use' interaction that teaches spells and advances the player's test.
